title: VideoSettingsRefresh
description: This mod automatically refreshes minecrafts settings when you load into a world or join a server to help prevent visual glitches
body:
Ever joined a new world or server and noticed weird lighting, broken shaders, or rendering glitches? Video Settings Refresh fixes that by automatically reloading your client’s video settings every time you join a world or multiplayer server — ensuring your visuals are always up to date and consistent.

⚡ Features

*✅ Automatically refreshes video settings on world or server join

*🧠 Prevents common rendering issues (lighting bugs, shader desyncs, etc.)

*🌈 Works seamlessly with shaders, resource packs, and optimization mods

*💡 Lightweight and client-side only — no server installation required

🧩 Compatibility

Minecraft 1.21.x

Fully compatible with Iris, Sodium, LambDynamicLights, and other visual mods

🔧 Technical Notes

Runs client-side only

No gameplay or performance impact

Safe to use on any server
